subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-19 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: All mankind partaketh of sustenance, yet were they to endeavor to create but a single grain, they would prove powerless. God beareth all the burdens of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع بشر حاضر خوردن هستند، اگر بخواهند یک حبه را خلق کنند نتوانند.  همه زحمت انسان را خدا می کشد
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @hospitality, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
